title: perf aggregation core lib + global-dir resolver + section schema
action: Create skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/perf.mjs exporting PURE, filesystem-injectable functions per D2/D3/D1: (1) encodeProjectDir(projectPath) mirroring Claude Code's '/'->'-' and '.'->'-' with a leading '-'; (2) resolveTranscript(projectsRoot, projectPath, {sessionId}) returning the newest-mtime <session>.jsonl (or the explicit sessionId file); (3) sliceEvents(lines, startTs, endTs) filtering by top-level ISO timestamp inclusive; (4) aggregateUsage(events) that dedupes assistant events by top-level requestId (keep the record with max output_tokens per id) then sums message.usage.{input_tokens,output_tokens,cache_creation_input_tokens,cache_read_input_tokens} PER message.model, excluding model '<synthetic>', returning per-model {input,output,cache_write,cache_read,new,cached,total} where new=input+output+cache_write and cached=cache_read; (5) walkSubagents(sessionDir, startTs, endTs) reading <session>/subagents/agent-*.jsonl (isSidechain) + agent-*.meta.json to attribute per-model worker tokens and return their time spans; (6) detectParallel(subagentSpans, parentEvents) -> true when >=2 subagent spans overlap OR >=2 Agent tool_use blocks share one assistant turn; (7) runningTimeMs(events, {idleThresholdMs=300000}) summing system/turn_duration durationMs in-window, falling back to summing consecutive-event gaps below the threshold when no turn_duration events exist; (8) globalPerfDir(env) resolving BEEHIVE_PERF_DIR || (XDG_CONFIG_HOME/beehive) || (os.homedir()/.config/beehive), and globalPerfLogPath(env) => <dir>/performance.jsonl; (9) buildSection({label,note,projectPath,branch,sessionId,startTs,endTs,models,parallel,runningTimeMs}) returning the JSON section record; (10) appendSection(env, record) and readSections(env, {limit}) via fsutil appendJsonl/readJsonl/ensureDir. Then create skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_perf.mjs: a standalone node test (SYNCHRONOUS assertions only — see critical-patterns 20260714 async-vacuous-pass) that writes fixture transcript JSONL (with a duplicated requestId across two chunks, two models, turn_duration events, one window WITHOUT turn_duration, and a subagents/ sidecar dir with two overlapping agents) into a temp dir and asserts: requestId de-dup (no double count), per-model new/cached/total math, <synthetic> excluded, running time excludes idle (turn_duration path) and the gap-fallback path, parallel true for overlapping sidecars and false for sequential, and globalPerfDir honoring BEEHIVE_PERF_DIR + XDG + home fallback with NO literal home path hard-coded. Prove falsifiability by confirming one assertion fails if an invariant is broken, then restore.

truths: Per D2: assistant usage deduped by requestId; per-model sums of input/output/cache_creation/cache_read; model '<synthetic>' excluded; new=input+output+cache_write, cached=cache_read.
Per D3: runningTimeMs sums turn_duration durationMs in-window; idle-gap fallback (threshold 300000ms) only when no turn_duration events.
Per D1: globalPerfDir resolves BEEHIVE_PERF_DIR then XDG_CONFIG_HOME/beehive then os.homedir()/.config/beehive — never a literal home path.
Subagent tokens attributed from sidecar agent-*.jsonl + .meta.json; parallel detected from overlapping spans or >=2 Agent tool_use in one turn.
All exported fns tolerate missing/empty transcript and null usage fields — return zeroed metrics, never throw (needed so CLI examples in perf-log-2 pass under assertExampleOk).
prohibitions: No literal home absolute path hard-coded anywhere.
No async test bodies under a non-awaiting runner (critical-patterns 20260714).
Do NOT wire the CLI here — lib + test only (that is perf-log-2).

perf.mjs must NOT be imported by command-registry.mjs — keep it out of that module's import graph (only bee.mjs imports perf.mjs), else the hand-listed VENDORED_LIB_MODULES fixture in templates/tests/test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs breaks (critical-patterns 20260712/20260714).

trace.outcome: lib/perf.mjs aggregation core + global-dir resolver + section schema; test_perf.mjs 19/19 green
trace.verification_evidence: { "deliberate_exceptions": ["Brand-new surface: skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/perf.mjs and its test did not exist before this cell; there is no prior behavior to characterize. Proof of new behavior = test_perf.mjs 19/19 green (recorded verify output)."] }

PASS falsifiability: dedup removes the duplicate (naive sum differs)
PASS sliceEvents keeps boundary events inclusive
PASS runningTimeMs sums turn_duration durationMs (idle excluded by harness)
PASS runningTimeMs fallback sums gaps below idle threshold, excludes long idle
PASS globalPerfDir honors BEEHIVE_PERF_DIR > XDG > home fallback
PASS perf.mjs source hard-codes no literal home path
PASS humanizeMs renders compact durations
PASS resolveTranscript finds explicit session file
PASS walkSubagents attributes worker tokens from sidecar
PASS detectParallel true for overlapping sidecar spans
PASS detectParallel false for sequential spans
PASS detectParallel true for >=2 Agent tool_use in one turn
PASS computeMetrics end-to-end (main + subagent + parallel + running time)
PASS computeMetrics tolerates null / missing transcript (no throw, zeroed)
PASS buildSection + appendSection + readSections roundtrip
